summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-25 is addressed via new backend queries (getAllCallbackRequests and getAllBookingRecords visible in useQueries.ts and referenced in AdminDashboard.tsx). REQ-26 is addressed by the new AdminDashboard.tsx page with three tabbed sections, sorting, counts, and themed styling, registered at '/admin' in App.tsx. REQ-27 is addressed by Admin link additions in Navbar.tsx for both desktop and mobile menus. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the available diff evidence.
